title: Apple’s privacy policy reveals an AI shopping assistant is coming to the Apple Store app
summary: Apple’s updated privacy policy for the Store app reveals a coming “Virtual Shopping Assistant.” It collects chat, device, and location data. The setting is found under Account > Settings in the Apple Store app.
caption: output/2026-07-23/apple-s-privacy-policy-reveals-an-ai-shopping-assistant-is-coming-to-t.txt
